Thunder-god hurls mountain peaks at coiled world-serpent whose body encircles all lands, venom raining from fangs splitting continents beneath roiling storm-clouds.
Feathered serpent descends through nine underworlds wreathed in jade fire, emerging to battle obsidian-armored gods across pyramids crumbling into volcanic abysses.
Storm-god severs seven heads from eight-headed dragon rising from churning seas, each bleeding neck spawning tidal waves that drown coastal kingdoms entire.
Ancient titans plummet from shattered heaven through lightning-torn clouds, their burning forms cratering earth as victorious sky-gods rain thunderbolts down.
Chaos-ocean rises as serpent-mother birthing monsters while hero-god splits her skull with wind-forged weapons, creating earth from her cosmic corpse.
Great wolf's jaws close upon sun-chariot, swallowing light whole as fire-giants march across rainbow-bridge toward gods' final stand on ash-covered plain.
Monkey-king wielding iron-pillar staff battles ten thousand celestial warriors across cloud-palaces, somersaulting through heaven's gates laughing at their spears.
Sky-falcon god and desert-chaos god shatter pyramids trading blows, one's solar disk blazing against the other's scorpion-tailed sandstorm across Nile's flooding.
Shepherd-hero grapples nemean-lion beneath olive trees, divine strength crushing bronze-proof hide while goddesses watch from marble columns measuring his worthiness.
Destruction-dancer's cosmic footsteps crack world-egg open, flames and renewal spiraling from each gesture as universe collapses and reforms through endless cycles.
Giant-wolves devour moon and stars while fire-demons surge from south, gods draw final swords on frozen plain where ice meets eternal flame.
First light-bearer challenges primordial waters, separating formless void with blazing sword as chaos-dragons writhe against creation's dawning order.
Trickster-god bound to mountain peak screams defiance as divine eagle tears his liver daily, his stolen fire still burning in mortal hands below.
Two divine races clash across stone circles, shape-shifting gods of earth meeting sky-lords in battle that reshapes every hill and sacred spring.
War-chariot goddess selects heroes from corpse-fields stretching to horizon, her spear pointing souls skyward while crows feast on divine carnage beneath.
Four suns have fallen in cosmic combat; fifth sun-god rises from sacrificial pyre demanding hearts to sustain light against encroaching star-serpents.
World-tree's roots burn as shadow-armies scale its trunk, light-elves defending highest branches with arrows of pure dawn against ascending night.
Dragon coiled in cosmic waters since creation rises against heaven's mandate, thunder-god descending on storm-clouds with axes that split scaled eternity.
Divine armies meet on cursed battlefield, god-kings commanding celestial weapons that level forests, their war deciding dharma for ten thousand years.
Storm-spirits shaped as lightning-birds battle primordial sea-chaos, their collision birthing islands from foam where neither water nor sky claims dominion.
Hundred-handed giants hurl burning stars at sky-gods descending with crystal spears, their cosmic wrestling match shattering constellations into meteor showers across collapsing heavens.
Trickster-god of crossroads battles underworld's bone-crowned lord through shadow-realms, each riddle-duel reshaping afterlife's gates while souls scatter like autumn leaves.
Hero-champion wrestles nine-headed hydra in poisoned marsh, each severed neck sprouting two more until divine fire cauterizes the regenerating nightmare into stone.
Two pantheons collide mid-sky: northern ice-gods against southern sun-lords, their weapons forging new stars from divine blood across the screaming void.
Cosmic serpent wrapped thrice around world awakens hungry, thunder-god strikes with hammer forged from dying star's core, both destined to perish entwined.
Multi-armed destroyer dances on demon-king's corpse, each hand wielding weapons that unmake reality while devotees chant creation back into reformed existence below.
Shield-maidens ride storm-clouds harvesting champions from battlefield ocean of blood, their choosings determining which souls feast eternally versus wandering gray shores.
Mountain-sized titans cast from paradise crash through cloud-layers trailing fire, their impact-craters becoming seas as younger gods claim their shattered thrones above.
Lion-faced sun-god battles river-chaos formed as crocodile-dragon across flooded kingdoms, their divine fury splitting dynasty from dynasty through centuries of warfare.
Sacred bull-god challenges sky-father across celestial pastures, their horn-locked combat trampling star-fields flat while creation trembles awaiting the victor's law.
Phoenix-lord rises from world-pyre to battle ice-titan whose breath freezes suns, their collision boiling oceans into steam-clouds obscuring all creation.
Underworld's three-headed hound breaks chain to devour life-goddess, spring dying as death-lord and trickster-coyote wage war across corpse-blooming fields.
Elephant-headed wisdom-god battles demon-king across cosmic chessboard, each move shattering planets as divine strategy rewrites fate's woven tapestry entire.
Jaguar-sun claws through underworld's nine levels hunting moon-rabbit, their chase splitting night from day across calendars carved in sacrificial blood.
Horned forest-king rallies animal-spirits against encroaching void-walkers, antler-crown blazing as nature's final stand cracks world-tree's roots beneath ancient oaths.
Rainbow-bridge shatters under marching fire-giants while frost-wyrms devour its foundations, warrior-gods making final stand where nine realms converge in apocalyptic maelstrom.
Twin archer-gods rain solar arrows upon shadow-beasts rising from eclipse, their combined light piercing darkness that would swallow all celestial cycles forever.
Anvil-wielding smith-god battles chaos-dragon hatched from cosmic forge's slag, each hammer-blow reshaping mountains while molten stars drip from wyrm's wings.
Maiden-goddess transforms into war-lion battling bull-demon across grain-fields, their divine rage determining harvest or famine for civilizations yet unborn below.
Spider-weaver goddess snares trickster-raven in reality's threads while coyote-god gnaws creation's loom, their cosmic game unraveling and reweaving existence simultaneously.
Bone-crowned death-lord drags trickster-fox through mirror-realms by iron chains while shapeshifter becomes thousand forms, their battle scattering souls across reincarnation's wheel.
Hero-prince confronts gorgon-queen in temple ruins, raising shield-mirror as her petrifying gaze turns fleeing warriors to limestone statues across blood-pooled marble.
Crane-maiden valkyries descend through arrow-storms selecting fallen emperors, their silk sleeves marking souls for ancestor-heaven while demons claim the cowardly below.
Serpent wrapped in galaxies awakens as thunder-smith strikes with star-forged maul, their prophesied mutual destruction igniting supernovas that birth new cosmos entire.
Two god-races clash at sacred well: antler-crowned earth-shapers against bronze-armored sky-conquerors, magic versus iron determining which laws govern reborn world.
Plumed sky-serpent crashes through celestial courts scattering jade thrones, laughing monkey-champion deflecting lightning with somersaults as heaven's order crumbles into glorious chaos.
Eight-headed sea-wyrm vomits tsunamis while storm-prince wields grass-cutter blade, severing necks until dragon-blood rivers carve new channels through submerged mountain ranges.
Lion-wrestling shepherd proves divine lineage crushing beast's invulnerable throat, his twelve trials beginning as owl-eyed goddess nods approval from olive-branch throne above.
Falcon-crowned sky-ruler battles jackal-headed desert-chaos across tomb-cities, their divine weapons splitting between ordered ma'at and devouring isfet for eternal kingship.
World-serpent mother births hurricane-demons from chaos-ocean while four-armed hero-god splits her skull with discus-sun, forming continents from her dismembered cosmic flesh.
